path.description: Request path that produced the error

userId.description: Actor user id; null when anonymous or deleted

items.description: Audit log entries for the page

source.description: "core" for built-in permissions, otherwise the declaring extension id

isAdmin.description: Whether the user is an administrator

require2fa.description: True when a 2FA challenge is required to finish login

twofaPrimary.description: Primary 2FA method, or null when none is set

notifyTaskResults.description: Whether the user receives task-result notifications

dashboardLayout.description: Persisted dashboard layout (opaque structure), or null

isAdmin.description: Admin flag (only honored for admin callers)

otp.description: One-time code to enter in the bot
OTP code for linking Telegram account

error.description: Error message when the bot is unavailable

variables.description: Blueprint variable values keyed by variable name
Blueprint variable values keyed by variable/port key

runtime.description: Per-server runtime override, falls back to the global setting

taskId.description: ID of the background task tracking the operation

confirmName.description: Server name typed by user for confirmation

variables.description: Partial blueprint variable values to merge

blueprintId.description: Target blueprint (core) id to switch to

version.description: Version to install. Required for cores that offer a version list.

downloadUrl.description: Download URL for available (not yet installed) versions

taskId.description: ID of the started background task

dockerCapable.description: Whether this blueprint can run in Docker (has a docker profile)

configFiles.description: Config files exposed by the blueprint

source.description: Where the blueprint was loaded from

valid.description: Whether the installed blueprint validated successfully

method.description: Active method for the new challenge

token.description: Session token, present only when status is 'approved'

user.description: User profile, present only when status is 'approved'

primary.description: Primary 2FA method, or null when none is set

qrDataUrl.description: QR code as a data URL

setupToken.description: Signed token binding this setup attempt

updateAvailable.description: Whether a newer version is available on GitHub

latestVersion.description: Latest version published on GitHub (without the 'v' prefix)

releaseNotes.description: Release notes (markdown) for the latest version

enabled.description: Whether the FTP service is enabled
Whether the Telegram bot is enabled

eulaAccepted.description: Whether the Minecraft EULA has been accepted

port.description: HTTP port the panel listens on

serverRuntime.description: Runtime new servers use, auto prefers docker when available

cpus.description: CPU model names, one entry per logical core

dockerAvailable.description: Whether a Docker daemon is reachable from the panel

privateIps.description: List of detected local (private) IPv4 addresses

path.description: Path relative to the server root

content.description: File content decoded as UTF-8 text

newName.description: New name for the file or directory

paths.description: List of file or directory paths

path.description: Path to the archive file to extract

paths.description: List of source file or directory paths to include in the archive

archiveName.description: Archive file name without extension (.zip is appended)

destPath.description: Directory path where the archive will be saved

primary.description: Whether this is the primary artifact
Whether this is the primary artifact

id.description: Installed record id (or `manual-<file>` for manual jars)

projectId.description: Modrinth project id (empty for manual files)

versionId.description: Modrinth version id (empty for manual files)

dependencyOf.description: Id of the record this is a dependency of

hasUpdate.description: Whether a newer version is available

projectId.description: Modrinth project id of the dependency

versionId.description: Modrinth version id of the dependency
Target Modrinth version id to update to

reinstall.description: Reinstall even if already up to date

removeDependants.description: Also remove dependants of this content

path.description: Path relative to the server root

fileCount.description: Number of files in the backup

globExceptions.description: Glob patterns excluded from the backup

taskId.description: ID of the started background task

expiresAt.description: Expiry (epoch ms), or null when non-expiring

current.description: Whether this is the session making the request

runAt.description: One-shot run timestamp (ms epoch, null otherwise)

action.description: Action performed when the task fires

Action performed when the task fires

folderId.description: Target folder id, null to clear folder

error.description: Error message when status is error

active.description: Whether the extension is currently active in the runtime (present on list responses)

icon.description: Manifest icon inlined as a data URI
